title: cornus lancifolia
intro: Cornus lancifolia, also known as the Korean dogwood or lancet-leaf dogwood, is a species of flowering plant in the cornus genus, native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, Cornus lancifolia is often used in tea or tincture form, and is also sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
